item.title: Comment on Le Corbussier et Papin by Ronaldo
item.dc:creator: Ronaldo
item.description: Ronaldo remembers his first wild poo in the old country. As I stood up I realised I had no hygienic paper to patter my cracker, but on the floor the turds had taken the shape of CR7. It was destiny.
item.content:encoded: Ronaldo remembers his first wild poo in the old country. As I stood up I realised I had no hygienic paper to patter my cracker, but on the floor the turds had taken the shape of CR7. It was destiny.

item.title: Comment on Truth or Consequences by MWP
item.dc:creator: MWP
item.description: Great reading, I'll be travelling through NM in August 2017.
item.content:encoded: Great reading, I’ll be travelling through NM in August 2017.

item.title: Comment on The California Raisin by Ronaldo
item.dc:creator: Ronaldo
item.description: Maybe one day I'll show you my budgie smugglers and we can go swimming? Ronaldo, loves root beer too
item.content:encoded: Maybe one day I’ll show you my budgie smugglers and we can go swimming? Ronaldo, loves root beer too

item.title: Comment on Return to Oz by Ronaldo
item.dc:creator: Ronaldo
item.description: Woop woop! I respect you Sam, you cannot end up like me, Ronaldo. I have a son who was grown in a tube because I couldn't make up my mind on my sexuality. It's sad because no one respects me for it, only my abs respect me.
item.content:encoded: Woop woop! I respect you Sam, you cannot end up like me, Ronaldo. I have a son who was grown in a tube because I couldn’t make up my mind on my sexuality. It’s sad because no one respects me for it, only my abs respect me.

item.title: Comment on The Man by Sam Pougher
item.dc:creator: Sam Pougher
item.description: Hi Robert, pleasure meeting you guys, hope all goes well on your future travels!
item.content:encoded: Hi Robert, pleasure meeting you guys, hope all goes well on your future travels!

item.title: Comment on The Man by Robert Rogina
item.dc:creator: Robert Rogina
item.description: Hey Sam , we just had lunch with you in Navasota , Texas. Enjoyed the 30 minutes, our best. Robert/Carmen
item.content:encoded:
Hey Sam , we just had lunch with you in Navasota , Texas.
Enjoyed the 30 minutes, our best.
Robert/Carmen

item.title: Comment on Punka by Sam Pougher
item.dc:creator: Sam Pougher
item.description: You can't say alcoholic custard and then say it doesn't taste nice Dave. That's not fair.
item.content:encoded: You can’t say alcoholic custard and then say it doesn’t taste nice Dave. That’s not fair.

item.title: Comment on Punka by Dave
item.dc:creator: Dave
item.description:
The fizzy white beverage is called makoli (막걸리), not Barcoli - I imagine the Korean who told you that had a cold. If you get the homemade or even rural versions, it's a bit more like alcoholic custard. Though not even as good as that sounds.
- Dave (fellow Brit in Sunshine)
item.content:encoded:
The fizzy white beverage is called makoli (막걸리), not Barcoli – I imagine the Korean who told you that had a cold. If you get the homemade or even rural versions, it’s a bit more like alcoholic custard. Though not even as good as that sounds.

– Dave (fellow Brit in Sunshine)

item.title: Comment on Intermission by Sam Pougher
item.dc:creator: Sam Pougher
item.description: Will do Rolf, might be a year or so before I'm back though. Pretty interested in the Great Victorian Bike Ride too.
item.content:encoded: Will do Rolf, might be a year or so before I’m back though. Pretty interested in the Great Victorian Bike Ride too.

item.title: Comment on Butt Sweat & Tears by Rolf
item.dc:creator: Rolf
item.description: I got the same seat too, am not impressed by it for a number of reasons. The most comfortable seat I own is a full carbon seat, try one next time and you too might love it like I do. The breaking in of a seat is really the breaking in of your arse, get used to it!
item.content:encoded: I got the same seat too, am not impressed by it for a number of reasons. The most comfortable seat I own is a full carbon seat, try one next time and you too might love it like I do. The breaking in of a seat is really the breaking in of your arse, get used to it!
